kycSteps.title: Business documents
kycSteps.detail: Upload certificate of incorporation and proof of address.

kycSteps.title: Identity verification
kycSteps.detail: Capture a government issued ID for all beneficial owners.

kycSteps.title: Bank statement
kycSteps.detail: Share a PDF copy from the last 3 months to verify ownership.

faqs.question: How do I generate payment links?
faqs.answer: Head to Collect → Payment links. You can share branded URLs or embed buttons on your site.

faqs.question: What does Zendt charge?
faqs.answer: UPI is free. Debit card 1.5%/1.9%. Credit card 2.2%–3.0%. International card 4% + live FX rate. GST at 18% charged additionally on all paid methods.

faqs.question: What currencies can my clients pay in?
faqs.answer: Any currency supported by Visa or Mastercard including QAR, AED, SAR, OMR, BHD, KWD. Earnings settle in INR.

faqs.question: Can my client pay partially?
faqs.answer: Yes. Payment link shows "Partially paid" status. Remaining balance is visible.

faqs.question: When do payments settle to my bank?
faqs.answer: Settlement timing follows your payment provider’s schedule; many domestic INR settlements complete within a business day.

faqs.question: When does my money arrive?
faqs.answer: Domestic UPI same day. Other domestic methods T+1. International T+3 working days.

faqs.question: Where does money go after a payment?
faqs.answer: Funds land in your Zendt wallet. Withdraw to your linked bank account anytime.

faqs.question: How do I withdraw to my bank?
faqs.answer: Go to wallet, tap Withdraw, enter amount. Reaches your bank within 1 business day.

faqs.question: Why do I need to complete KYC?
faqs.answer: RBI regulations require identity verification to receive international payments. One-time process, under 5 minutes.

faqs.question: What documents do I need?
faqs.answer: PAN card and bank account details. For professional verification, a work sample or client contract.

faqs.question: How long does KYC approval take?
faqs.answer: Most accounts approved within 24 hours. WhatsApp notification sent on approval.

faqs.question: Can I change my linked bank account?
faqs.answer: Yes. Go to Account, Bank accounts, add new account. Verification takes 1 business day.

faqs.question: Is my data safe with Zendt?
faqs.answer: All data encrypted in transit and at rest. Bank-grade security. Information is never shared with third parties.

faqs.question: Where can I reach support?
faqs.answer: Reach us on call, WhatsApp, or email hello@zendtpayments.com from the Help and Support screen.
